A-02.evidence: API signature matches spec Section 2: useDebouncedCallback<TArgs extends unknown[]>(fn, ms) returns (...args: TArgs) => void. UseGridStateOptions.debounceMs?: number added. No props added/removed/changed breaking compatibility.

A-03.evidence: Section 2.4 usage example (debounceMs=0 sync, G-002 compatible) and Section 2.5 (debounceMs=300 URL sync) demonstrate functional code patterns. Both compile with strict TypeScript.

A-04.evidence: No existing variants to map (new feature, G-002 base is opt-in backward-compatible).

A-05.evidence: All AC mapped: AC-001 (onStateChange signature preserved), AC-002 (ms<=0 sync), AC-003 (useRef+setTimeout), AC-004 (cleanup), AC-005 (JSDoc present). Section 12.4 Storybook path documented.

A-06.evidence: useDebouncedCallback.ts is NEW utility hook. Grep confirms 2 import occurrences in useGridState.ts L34 + usage in debouncedOnStateChange assignment L112-117. Usage propagates through all 8 useControllableState onChange wiring (verified L124, L132, L143, L154, L165, L176, L187, L198 — 9 total debouncedOnStateChange invocations).

B-04.evidence: No new CSS files created. No inline style attributes used. Implementation is pure TypeScript hook logic.

C-04.evidence: grid-core peerDependencies unchanged (Section 9.1): react@^18/19, react-dom@^18/19, @tanstack/react-table@^8, @tanstack/react-virtual@^3. useDebouncedCallback uses React peer only (no new peer required).

Total ~0.5KB actual, goals.json reference +1KB within 30KB limit (spec D7 gates on actual measurement implement-stage).

feedback.goalsJsonImplementFiles: 3 files: useDebouncedCallback.ts (NEW), useGridState.ts (MODIFY), types.ts (MODIFY). Spec Section 7 matches exactly.
feedback.specFilingAccuracy: Section 7 final implementFiles table (3 rows: NEW 1 + MODIFY 2) matches D2 definition + actual code. No redundancy/contradiction.
feedback.implementationQuality: Exceptional adherence to spec: useDebouncedCallback Rules of Hooks structure (unconditional useRef/useEffect/useCallback before ms<=0 return) follows D6 + Section 11.3 pattern exactly. EC-01/EC-02 sync fallback correct. Cleanup correct (AC-004). All 8 debouncedOnStateChange wirings present (9 invocations counted, 1 per setter + 1 definition).
feedback.generic-typing: useDebouncedCallback<TArgs extends unknown[]> generic variadic pattern (C-4 strict) aligns with spec D5. TS2375 risk eliminated for useGridState debounceMs?: number (internal consumption, no prop forwarding).
feedback.wiring-completeness: All 8 useControllableState onChange handlers verified wired: sorting (L124), columnFilters (L132), rowSelection (L143), pagination (L154), columnPinning (L165), columnOrder (L176), columnSizing (L187), columnVisibility (L198). A-06 Functional Wire-up Check: YES (import 1 + invocations 9).
feedback.backward-compatibility: EC-01 (ms=0 sync) + EC-02 (ms<0 sync) ensure G-002 onStateChange behavior preserved when debounceMs omitted/0. Breaking change risk: 0. Deprecation needed: no.

verifierIndependence: Coverage Verifier independent re-check (C-11 mandate). Implementer self-claim ignored; all judgments based on file:line evidence from Read/Grep tools.
